description: Search a compound by name in KEGG and cross-reference its identifiers across ChEBI and ChEMBL (via UniChem), plus basic properties. Writes a text report.
rules: read-only — queries KEGG / UniChem / ChEBI / ChEMBL APIs, writes local files only
COMPOUND is a free-text compound name (e.g. Geldanamycin, Aspirin)
first KEGG hit is used; ChEBI is taken from the KEGG entry; ChEMBL is mapped via UniChem
report written to record_store as compound_xref.txt
limitation: Needs the bioservices Python package and internet access to KEGG/UniChem/ChEBI/ChEMBL. Offline / package-absent runs still produce compound_xref.txt (degraded, may be empty).
